title: Inside the data centres powering AI: gold racks, demented noise, and 40 diesel generators
summary: Axios’s Amy Harder toured a test server hall run by Digital Realty in Ashburn, Virginia, the heart of America’s “data center alley.” The first thing she noticed was the sound, which she called “demented white noise.” It comes from fans fighting the…
